channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ex-Prince Andrew Was Arrested Upon Turning 66 in Same Home Where Queen Elizabeth Spent Final Birthday Before Her Death
item.description: The location of Andrew's arrest was a favorite of his late mother and father

item.title: Inside Calvin Klein's Dating History, Including His 2 Ex-Wives and 46-Year Age-Gap Relationship
item.description: Fashion designer Calvin Klein was married to his high school sweetheart, Jayne Centre, for a decade

item.title: Priscilla Presley Opens Up About Early Romance with Elvis: What They Did 'Every Night'
item.description: Priscilla and Elvis were married from 1967 to 1973

item.title: Meet Olympic Figure Skater Alysa Liu's Siblings! All About Selina and Triplets Julia, Joshua and Justin
item.description: Alysa Liu skated in front of her siblings for the first time at the 2026 Milan Cortina Winter Olympics

item.title: Heidi Klum Wants to Make a Halloween Anthem with Diplo: 'Definitely a Hole in the Marketplace' (Exclusive)
item.description: The two stars tell PEOPLE about their new collaboration "Red Eye" and the prospect of making a spooky song together in the future

item.title: 'ANTM' Cycle 3 Winner Eva Marcille Says She Was Shocked by Claims in Doc
item.description: Eva Marcille is making it crystal clear -- she had no clue about the dark side of "America’s Next Top Model" now blowing up in Netflix’s scandal-soake...

item.title: Chris Brown's Baby Mama & His Current GF Go Back and Forth on Socials
item.description: Chris Brown's ex, Diamond Brown, and his rumored current girlfriend, Jada Wallace, are going at it on socials in an epic back-and-forth... and it's ge...

item.title: Ex-'RHOC' Star Elizabeth Lyn Vargas Mourns Former Husband's Death
item.description: Former 'Real Housewives of Orange County' star Elizabeth Lyn Vargas is speaking out about the death of her business tycoon ex-husband Bernt Bodel ... ...

item.title: Tom Brady’s NoBull Drops New Kicks W/ Livvy Dunne Campaign
item.description: Tom Brady’s NoBull just made a splashy new addition -- and Livvy Dunne is officially in the building. The former LSU gymnastics star took to Instagram...

item.title: Michael Jackson Pepsi Commercial Led to His Downfall and Death
item.description: Michael Jackson's downfall can be directly traced to the 1984 Pepsi commercial that set his hair ablaze ... and we connect the dots in our new documen...
